3d.name: get_editor_performance

3d.name: add_autoload

3d.description: Recursively list project files starting at `path` (default `res://`). Supports glob `filter` (e.g. `*.gd`) and `max_depth`.

3d.description: Remove an autoload singleton from project settings.

3d.description: Search file contents for a pattern across the project.

3d.description: Set a project.godot setting. Persists to disk.

3d.name: uid_to_project_path
3d.description: Convert a Godot UID (`uid://...`) to a `res://` path.

3d.description: Inspect an autoload singleton's properties.

3d.name: open_scene
3d.description: Open a scene in the Godot editor.

3d.name: play_scene
3d.description: Play the project. `mode` may be "main" (project main scene), "current" (currently edited), or a `res://` path.

3d.description: Save the currently edited scene to disk.

3d.name: stop_scene
3d.description: Stop the currently running game/scene.

3d.name: attach_script
3d.description: Attach an existing script to a node in the edited scene.

3d.description: List scripts currently open in the editor's script tabs.

3d.description: List all script files in the project with class info.

3d.description: Read the contents of a script file.

3d.name: validate_script
3d.description: Validate GDScript syntax of a file.

3d.name: assign_shader_material
3d.description: Assign a ShaderMaterial to a node.

3d.description: Create a .gdshader file with an optional template.

3d.name: edit_shader
3d.description: Edit a shader file — full or search/replace.

3d.name: get_shader_params
3d.description: Get all uniform parameters of a shader.

3d.name: read_shader
3d.description: Read the contents of a shader file.

3d.name: set_shader_param
3d.description: Set a shader uniform parameter.

3d.name: assert_node_state
3d.description: Assert that node properties match expected values.

3d.name: assert_screen_text
3d.description: Assert that text is visible on screen.

3d.description: Get the latest test results report.

3d.name: set_theme_font_size

3d.name: set_theme_stylebox

lite.name: clear_output
lite.description: Clear the editor's output panel.

lite.name: compare_screenshots
lite.description: Compare two screenshots and return diff info.

lite.name: execute_editor_script
lite.description: Execute arbitrary GDScript in the editor process. Useful for one-off tasks. Use with care.

lite.name: get_editor_camera
lite.description: Get editor camera — editor tool. See README "All Tools" for details.

lite.name: get_editor_errors
lite.description: Get recent errors and stack traces from the editor's debugger/output.

lite.name: get_editor_screenshot
lite.description: Capture a screenshot of the editor viewport. Returns a base64 PNG.

lite.name: get_game_screenshot
lite.description: Capture a screenshot of the running game viewport. Returns a base64 PNG.

lite.name: get_output_log
lite.description: Get the editor output panel content.

lite.name: get_signals
lite.description: Get all signals defined on a node and their connections.

lite.name: reload_plugin
lite.description: Reload the MCP plugin (will auto-reconnect).

lite.name: reload_project
lite.description: Rescan the filesystem and reload scripts.

lite.name: set_auto_dismiss
lite.description: Set auto dismiss — editor tool. See README "All Tools" for details.

lite.name: set_editor_camera
lite.description: Set editor camera — editor tool. See README "All Tools" for details.

lite.name: simulate_action
lite.description: Simulate a Godot Input Action (press/release).

lite.name: simulate_key
lite.description: Simulate a keyboard key press/release in the running game.

lite.name: simulate_mouse_click
lite.description: Simulate a mouse click at a screen position.

lite.name: simulate_mouse_move
lite.description: Simulate mouse movement to a screen position.

lite.name: simulate_sequence
lite.description: Send a sequence of input events with frame delays between them.

lite.name: get_input_actions
lite.description: List all defined input actions and their bindings.

lite.name: set_input_action
lite.description: Create or modify an input action and its bindings.

lite.name: add_node
lite.description: Add a new node of `type` under `parent_path`. Optional `properties` dict initializes properties (smart type parsing for Vector2, Color, etc.).

lite.name: add_resource
lite.description: Attach a resource (Shape, Material, Texture …) to a node property.

lite.name: connect_signal
lite.description: Connect a signal between two nodes.

lite.name: delete_node
lite.description: Delete a node from the edited scene (with undo).

lite.name: disconnect_signal
lite.description: Disconnect a signal connection.

lite.name: duplicate_node
lite.description: Duplicate a node and its children.

lite.name: find_nodes_in_group
lite.description: Find all nodes that belong to a given group.

lite.name: get_node_groups
lite.description: Get the groups a node belongs to.

lite.name: get_node_properties
lite.description: Get all properties of a node, including inherited ones.

lite.name: move_node
lite.description: Move/reparent a node to a new parent path.

lite.name: rename_node
lite.description: Rename a node in the edited scene.

lite.name: set_anchor_preset
lite.description: Set a Control's anchor preset (PRESET_*).

lite.name: set_node_groups
lite.description: Replace the group membership of a node.

lite.name: update_property
lite.description: Set a property on a node. Values support smart parsing: `Vector2(1,2)`, `Color(1,0,0)`, `#ff0000`, `Rect2(...)`, etc.
